ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the operator operates */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the operator (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., SOUTHWEST, WESTERN) */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, county, city) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the region record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_orders" (
  "compliance_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance order */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator associated with the compliance order */,
  "compliance_order_type" INTEGER /* Type of compliance order (e.g., yes/no) */,
  "compliance_order_category" INTEGER /* Category of compliance order (e.g., environmental, safety) */,
  "compliance_order_subcategory" INTEGER /* Subcategory of compliance order (e.g., environmental -> water pollution, air pollution) */,
  "final_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the final order */,
  "civil_penalties_assessed" TEXT /* Amount of civil penalties assessed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the compliance order */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the compliance order (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_orders_compliance_order_category FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_order_category") REFERENCES compliance_order_categories ("compliance_order_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_orders_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_orders_compliance_order_type FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_order_type") REFERENCES compliance_order_types ("compliance_order_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_orders_compliance_order_subcategory FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_order_subcategory") REFERENCES compliance_order_subcategories ("compliance_order_subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_order_types" (
  "compliance_order_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance order type */,
  "compliance_order_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance order type (e.g., yes/no) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order type record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_order_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_order_categories" (
  "compliance_order_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance order category */,
  "compliance_order_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance order category (e.g., environmental, safety) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order category record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_order_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_order_subcategories" (
  "compliance_order_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance order subcategory */,
  "compliance_order_subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance order subcategory (e.g., environmental -> water pollution, air pollution) */,
  "compliance_order_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance order category associated with the subcategory */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order subcategory record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order subcategory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_order_subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "compliance_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance order associated with the case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the case record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the case record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_compliance_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_order_id") REFERENCES compliance_orders ("compliance_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "civil_penalties" (
  "civil_penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each civil penalty */,
  "compliance_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance order associated with the civil penalty */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the civil penalty */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the civil penalty record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the civil penalty record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("civil_penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_civil_penalties_compliance_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_order_id") REFERENCES compliance_orders ("compliance_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operator_contacts" (
  "operator_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator contact */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator associated with the contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_contacts_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, operator, stakeholder) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, operator, stakeholder) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role permission record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, view compliance order) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user activity record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_order_history" (
  "compliance_order_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance order history entry */,
  "compliance_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance order associated with the history entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the compliance order */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order was changed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order history record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance order history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_order_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_order_history_compliance_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_order_id") REFERENCES compliance_orders ("compliance_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "case_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case history entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the history entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the case */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was changed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the case history record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the case history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operator_history" (
  "operator_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator history entry */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator associated with the history entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the operator */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator was changed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator history record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_history_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_history" (
  "region_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region history entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the history entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the region */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the region was changed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the region history record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the region history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_history_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_order_attachments" (
  "compliance_order_attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance order attachment */,
  "compliance_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance order associated with the attachment */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* Attachment file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_order_attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_order_attachments_compliance_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_order_id") REFERENCES compliance_orders ("compliance_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_attachments" (
  "case_attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case attachment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the attachment */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* Attachment file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_attachments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
